mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, views, admin_id AS adminId, create_time AS createdAt FROM news ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, title, content, views, admin_id AS adminId, create_time AS createdAt FROM news ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, title, content, views, admin_id AS adminId, create_time AS createdAt FROM news WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO news (title, content, views, admin_id, create_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{views}, #{adminId}, NOW())
